reviews.comment: I recently purchased a new vehicle.  I wanted to get my windows tinted to help keep my new SUV cooler and comfortable.  My wife and I originally selected this company as they were close to home and to support a small business.  The service is exactly what you hope for and you can tell that they care about their customers.  Sharyn worked with us to book an appointment that worked around our schedule.  The work was done in a timely fashion and you can see that there is an attention to detail and quality workmanship.  I am 100% satisfied with my tint job, and do recommend Frederick Window Tinting to anyone in the market.

reviewReply.comment: We're so happy you love the results! Thank you for coming in and we look forward to seeing you again!
